name: commentray
description: Commentray monorepo — out-of-file documentation anchored to code

scripts.build: npm run build -w @commentray/core && npm run build -w @commentray/render && npm run build -w code-commentray-static && npm run build -w @commentray/cli && npm run build -w commentray-vscode
scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm run dupes
scripts.test:unit: npm run build -w @commentray/render && vitest run -c vitest.config.ts
scripts.code-commentray-static:build: npm run build -w @commentray/render && npm run build -w code-commentray-static && npm run site -w code-commentray-static
scripts.pages:build: npm run build -w @commentray/core && npm run build -w @commentray/render && npm run build -w code-commentray-static && node scripts/build-static-pages.mjs
